title: JEI Enhancements
description: Enhances JEI with powerful bookmark management, recipe grouping, and intuitive quantity controls for a smoother crafting experience.
body:
## Features

### Bookmark Management
- Group bookmarks together for better organization
- Crafting chain mode: automatically calculate required materials based on recipe ratios
- Adjustable quantities with Ctrl + Scroll
- Vertical/Horizontal layout toggle

### Enhanced Display
- Quantity display on bookmarks
- Fluid amounts shown in L/kL units
- Hold Shift to view stack breakdown (e.g., 128 = 2 × 64)
- Hold Alt to view operation hints

### Intuitive Controls
- Drag to merge/split bookmark groups
- Quick recipe-to-bookmark with Ctrl + Shift + A
- Right-click bracket to enable chain calculation mode

## Requirements
- Just Enough Items (JEI)

## Notes
- Client-side only, no server installation required
- More features planned for future updates
